character_identity_card: PROTAGONIST IDENTITY (IMMUTABLE CORE TRAITS, applied to whichever scene-specific age the per-scene prompt specifies — NEVER render multiple ages side by side, NEVER produce a model sheet or character lineup, ALWAYS render exactly ONE figure of the protagonist embedded in the narrative scene described below): Italian-American man, single figure only. Face: perfectly circular, 100% pure white (#FFFFFF), completely flat, no shading, no skin tone, NO nose, NO cheeks, NO visible teeth. Features: only 2 small black dot eyes, 2 short straight black eyebrow strokes slightly thicker and lower-set than secondary characters to convey hardness, 1 short horizontal black mouth line. Hands: pure white MITTEN shapes with no individual finger detail. Hair color: jet black with heavy pomade (turning grey-streaked then full steel-grey only when the scene's specified age requires it). Body type: lean wiry when the scene's age is young, broader heavier-shouldered when the scene's age is mature. The exact age-specific outfit, hairstyle, scar, onyx pinky ring, cigar, fedora and gold crucifix to render are dictated EXCLUSIVELY by the per-scene prompt — do NOT show all ages, do NOT render an evolution chart, do NOT split the character into multiple figures: produce a single embedded figure within the described environment.
character_block: The central subject is the Mafia capo (see identity card above — DO NOT deviate). ABSOLUTE RULE FOR OTHER HUMANS IN THE SCENE: EVERY other human character — Don, consigliere, capi crew, soldati, made men, associates, runners, Irish mob rivals, Jewish bookmakers, FBI agents, NYPD detectives, judge, priest, his crying mother, his father, his cadet brother, his ex-wife, his daughter, the cook at the family restaurant, club hostesses, jazz musicians, dock workers, the bookkeeper, the Don's grandson — MUST share the white round featureless face style: pure WHITE ROUND FACE with only tiny black dot eyes, thin eyebrow strokes, and minimal straight mouth line. NO realistic human faces, NO skin tones, NO noses, NO cheeks, NO wrinkles, NO visible teeth. Hands always pure white mitten shapes. Secondary characters differ ONLY by: hair shape (slick-back, crew cut, shaved bald, balding crown with white scalp showing, side-part, woman's bun or bob, elderly grey low bun, red short hair shape for Irish), beards/moustaches as small black or grey shapes attached to the white face (only for older men, drawn flat), small black yarmulke for Jewish bookmaker, body build, and clothing. Key character markers: DON / CAPO DEI CAPI — older man, fully steel-grey slick-back hair, thick black-grey horseshoe moustache shape, formal black three-piece suit with black silk vest, walking cane with engraved silver handle, large gold pinky ring with central garnet stone, sits centered, never standing in early scenes, smokes a cigar; CONSIGLIERE — thin tall build, side-parted black-grey hair, small round black-rimmed glasses drawn as 2 small black ovals over the dot eyes, sober dark grey single-breasted suit, small leather briefcase, never wears a fedora; CAPI / older brothers in family — slick-back black hair pompadour, sharp suits with colored silk ties (deep green, burgundy, royal blue to differentiate), small scar on cheek (made men), pinky ring on left, fedora; SOLDATI / younger made men — buzzcut or short slicked hair, plain black or charcoal suits, white shirt no tie or skinny tie, small scar on left cheek; ASSOCIATES / runners — messy hair or undercut, no jacket / leather jacket / open-collar shirt, no scar, no fedora; IRISH MOB rivals — short red-orange hair shape, 3 tiny black freckle-dots on the round white face, green tweed three-piece suit with bowler hat, gold pocket watch, shamrock pin on lapel — visual contrast; JEWISH BOOKMAKER — small black yarmulke as a flat dark dome on the round head, dark grey three-piece suit, black-rimmed glasses, leather briefcase clutched tight; FBI AGENTS — short clean side-part sandy-brown hair shape, grey overcoat over navy suit, FBI badge as a tiny gold rectangle clipped on the lapel, dark sunglasses sometimes (drawn as 2 small black squares over the dot eyes); NYPD DETECTIVES — short side-part black hair, beige raincoat over wrinkled grey suit, small police badge as a tiny gold dot on lapel, often holding a notepad and pencil; PRIEST — black cassock and white Roman collar, small silver crucifix necklace, kindly older face shape with grey hair tonsure; JUDGE — black robe, white Velcro collar, small wooden gavel in hand, balding crown with white scalp showing under thin grey side-hair, holding gold-rimmed reading glasses; FATHER (papa) — older Sicilian-immigrant man, white slick-back hair, thick grey-white moustache, plain black work jacket and brown work cap, weathered work hands, often standing in olive groves or behind a barber chair; MOTHER (mamma) — elderly small frail woman, white hair in low bun, faded black widow's dress with apron, wooden rosary beads always in hand, never leaves the kitchen / family table; YOUNGER BROTHER (the screw-up) — same DA cut as protagonist at 17 but more chaotic, oversized leather jacket over a stained white t-shirt, dark circles under eyes drawn as 2 small grey arcs, no scar, no ring; EX-WIFE — dark wavy hair tied back with a single pearl barrette, cream silk blouse with single gold cross necklace, small pearl earrings as 2 tiny dots; DAUGHTER (adult) — straight black bob, modern cream coat, never any family markers, sometimes holding a baby (her own); CLUB HOSTESSES — elaborate updo hair with single red rose ornament, glossy red lips drawn as a slightly thicker red mouth line (the ONLY exception to the pure black mouth line, used sparingly), tight black or sequined cocktail dress, holding cigarette holder or martini glass; JAZZ MUSICIAN — slick-back hair, white tuxedo jacket, holding a black saxophone or trumpet drawn as flat shapes; DOCK WORKER — short crew cut hair, navy work coverall and beanie, holding a crowbar or crate; THE BOOKKEEPER — balding crown with thin grey side-hair, sweater-vest over a white shirt, holding a leather-bound ledger and a pencil. The WHITE ROUND FACE is non-negotiable on every humanoid in the frame.
global_style_card: STYLE (LOCKED, IDENTICAL IN EVERY SCENE): children's picture book / storytime YouTube animation, soft 2D cel-shading. Pure 2D — NO 3D render, NO photorealism, NO anime, NO manga screentones. Outlines: uniform, bold black, ~3-5px thickness everywhere (characters, suits, props, architecture, vintage signage, vehicles, weapons, cigars, fedoras). Colors: flat fills with at most 2-3 tonal shades per object (no smooth gradients on faces or bodies). Palette dominant: deep matte black (suits, fedoras, lacquered restaurant booths, NYC asphalt, limousines), bone white (shirts, faces, communion candles, Sicilian villa walls), wet midnight blue (rainy NYC streets at night, riverside docks), deep burgundy red (wine, neckties, Tiffany-lamp restaurant booths, blood on a white handkerchief sparingly), mahogany brown (cigars, leather chairs, restaurant wood paneling, Sicilian wine barrels), olive green (Sicily countryside, olive groves, Sicilian peasant vests, billiard tables), warm aged gold (jewelry, gold pocket watches, gold crucifixes, fedora pins, baroque picture frames in dining rooms, opera house chandeliers), terracotta orange (Sicilian roofs, sunset horizon, brick tenements), cream / off-white (Sicilian villas, communion dresses, family tablecloths), Tiffany glass amber (lamps, brandy snifters, jukebox glow), cold fluorescent green-white (FBI office, prison block, courtroom), pale ash grey (concrete, Long Island compound walls, prison). Lighting: cinematic and oppressive — single hanging Tiffany lamp warm-amber glow over restaurant backroom card games (NOT on faces — faces stay flat white), warm low candlelight in private dining rooms, cold flat overhead fluorescents in FBI offices and prison blocks, single hard interrogation spotlight in courtroom and police station scenes, golden hour warm Sicilian light through bougainvillea vines for olive grove and villa scenes, deep moonlit indigo for NYC waterfront docks at night, neon-tinged wet asphalt in Little Italy night streets (red and warm yellow neon spilling on wet ground only, faces stay flat white), incense haze and stained-glass colored beams inside Catholic churches. NEVER use harsh rim light or gradient on faces — faces remain pure flat white in all lighting conditions, only background and clothing react to light. Architecture and environment: red-brick Little Italy and Bensonhurst tenements with iron fire escapes, Italian restaurants with red-checkered tablecloths and Tiffany lamps and dark wood paneling, smoky backroom card tables with green felt and hanging brass lamps, marble steps of Catholic church facades with wrought-iron lanterns, stained-glass confession booths, Atlantic City casino floors with green felt tables and chandeliers, Brooklyn waterfront docks with stacked wooden crates, Manhattan skyline at night, family Sunday dinner round tables loaded with pasta and bread and wine, Long Island compound with iron front gate and gravel drive, federal prison block with grey concrete and barred cells, courtroom with wood paneling and federal seal, Sicilian villages with whitewashed stone walls and bougainvillea vines spilling over arches, olive groves with twisted trees and golden hills, Sicilian villa kitchen with hanging garlic braids and copper pots, opera house balcony with red velvet seats and golden balustrade, jazz club with art-deco interior and small round tables, Brooklyn barbershop with red-and-white striped pole and tiled floor. Aspect ratio: 16:9 cinematic. Composition: environment dominates the frame, the protagonist often small against vast brick walls or wide dining rooms (emphasizes how the Family swallows him), tighter framing for intimate moments (oath kissing the Don's ring, first hit, last cigar before the verdict). Recurring visual motifs to weave throughout: rain on Little Italy asphalt, single red Tiffany lamp glow, curling cigar smoke, the gold crucifix peeking at the open shirt collar, the onyx pinky ring catching warm lamplight, a glass of red Chianti, a pile of bills banded with paper, a black .38 silhouette resting on a green felt table, falling rose petals at the daughter's wedding, candlelight reflected in the eyes (still flat white).
style_block: clean 2D cel-shading storytime YouTube animation style, bold thick black outlines, flat simple colors, vintage Little Italy New York and rural Sicily aesthetic, deep blacks and burgundy reds with mahogany browns and warm aged gold accents, olive green Sicilian touches, Tiffany-amber lamplight on dark wood interiors, cinematic oppressive composition, 16:9
